included: Round 02 source intake and source pinning
license, provenance, security, portability, overlap, and adaptation review
candidate disposition and separately approved repository release execution
dated separately approved local runtime sync evidence
Round 02 residual risks, deferred work, and next-round decision preparation
excluded: refreshing upstream sources beyond the pinned 2026-07-02 evidence
activating Round 03 or a new candidate-intake round
approving deferred adapters, toolchains, media behavior, or high-stakes outputs
remote push of the 2026-07-15 program-control and closeout-preparation commits

requirementReconciliation.requirement: Each in-scope source has an exact pinned revision and license review.
requirementReconciliation.result: Three of three sources have full Git revisions, MIT license evidence, and recorded review dispositions.

requirementReconciliation.requirement: Every admitted Round 02 adaptation candidate has an explicit disposition.
requirementReconciliation.result: All 16 adaptation candidates have one of proposed-approved-payload, merge, adapter-only, reference-only, or reject dispositions.

requirementReconciliation.requirement: No candidate enters release inventory without an owner approval chain and repository verification.
requirementReconciliation.result: One new approved Skill payload and six bounded merge candidates were executed only after recorded owner approvals and deterministic verification.

requirementReconciliation.requirement: Repository, manifest, topology, routing, and test verification remain current at closeout preparation time.
requirementReconciliation.result: The closeout preparation batch requires the full repository verification suite before commit or owner review.

requirementReconciliation.requirement: Residual risks, deferred work, and the next-round or pause decision are explicit.
requirementReconciliation.result: The review records four residual-risk classes, deferred work, and a pause-and-rebaseline recommendation for Round 03.

residualRisks.impact: The dated local runtime sync record does not prove current loader health, current junction targets, or live behavior across Codex, Claude, TRAE, WorkBuddy, or other consumers.
residualRisks.control: Keep currentLiveStateClaimed=false and require fresh consumer-owned evidence for any live-parity claim.

residualRisks.impact: Adapters, external toolchains, media workflows, legal/privacy outputs, asset redistribution, credentials, and external execution remain outside approved release scope.
residualRisks.control: Retain their adapter-only, reference-only, reject, or separately reviewed disposition.

residualRisks.impact: The three external source reviews are pinned to 2026-07-02 revisions and do not describe later upstream changes.
residualRisks.control: Use lifecycle-metabolism triggers and a new source refresh transaction before relying on newer upstream state.

residualRisks.impact: The planned Round 03 adaptation-and-admission contract overlaps work already completed through separately approved Round 02 follow-on gates.
residualRisks.control: Do not activate Round 03 unchanged; rebaseline its goal, inputs, non-goals, and exit criteria against the current program architecture.

deferredWork: upstream refresh after the pinned 2026-07-02 revisions
separate review of adapter-only, toolchain, media, credential, asset, and high-stakes candidates
recommendationRationale: Round 02 exit criteria and the later separately approved release and runtime-sync transactions are evidenced and verified. Closing only this bounded round is supportable, while activating Round 03 unchanged is not because its contract overlaps completed work and the broader capability-survey initiative still requires a fresh bounded execution plan.

decisionOptions.effect: Record an owner acceptance event, close Round 02, keep Round 03 inactive, and make Round 03 rebaseline or capability-survey planning the next bounded initiative.
Keep Round 02 in needs-closeout and identify the exact missing or disputed evidence without activating new intake.
